I want to discuss, you know, at some point.
Sure.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.

It's very early.
We, that approach isn't exactly what we were doing.

Yeah.

Yeah.

will say, this is easy, because that's what I want to do.
That's right, exactly.
Yeah, and I think that's a good theory.
And, like, that is the reason we're testing them is because we're like, yeah, we want to try this as well and see what the results are.
And then we...
We have the benefit of being able to see across clients, like, you know, we have a better sample set of, like, whether it's working or not, right?
Also, the stakes are lower for wrong information, for example.
Do you know what I mean?
It's not, it's, you're not, a human's not going to Google their way onto it.

You know, no one would have to review anything else, all that stuff.

As opposed to recreating the structure in, like, a shadow version.
But I'm going to bring that back because I think it's worth trying.
And especially when you're at the starting point, like you are from a content perspective, like that makes it.

So, yes, all heard there.
I'm very interested in it.
I have an academic interest in just like, okay, is this anything?
Because the LLM, the indexing thing is true, but what's also true is that the LLMs index everything.
Like, they are voracious, omnivorous monsters, and they will index whatever you put on your website, right?
Now, whether or not they're, like, making use of that is a totally different story because you can see them hitting it, but you can't see how they use them, right?
But there's some indication, like, I think Anthropic is the one they put up their own LLMs.txt on their trunk, like, domain.
So, like, the fact that Anthropic is using it indicates that they're thinking about it or trying to figure out how to ingest it, right?
So, yeah, definitely worth experimenting with.
worth it.
I can, I'll talk to Dave after this and like get you into RQ because we have a generation pipeline we're developing that's supposed to do exactly this thing.

In terms of at least driving leads.

Yeah.

think others are more like the spreadsheet also calculates for you.

Yeah.
Okay.

then you can decide whether you want to like put the...

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [5 articles submitted for review; 5 more lined up for tomorrow to build a content buffer](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [H1 tag duplication issue addressed; design tweaks discussed to improve UX and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Exploring GEO blog strategy and LLM.txt implementation for potential SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Considering new content types (e.g., tax scenario templates, top app lists) for future implementation](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [5 articles submitted for review; issue with Ludmilla's access resolved](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [5 more articles lined up for tomorrow, building a hedge for future content](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Aim: Publish backlog by Friday, new set early next week](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Goal: Maintain a 5-article buffer submitted every Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Blog Design and SEO Optimization

  - [Addressed H1 tag duplication issue; revised H1s to differ from titles](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Discussed moving graphical elements up, integrating text into hero image](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Debated HTML structure for title, H1, and image placement](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Action: Pier to discuss with Tony about implementing design changes and H1 tag solution](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Analytics and SEO Progress

  - [Some impressions registered in Bing, but too early for significant position improvements](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Need to continue publishing consistently to see meaningful results](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### GEO Blog Strategy

  - [Discussed creating a "hidden" blog for GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Content structure: H2s as common questions, paragraphs as bullet-point answers](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Darrell to explore implementation with Dave, comparing to current LLM.txt approach](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Potential to generate parallel GEO Q\&A content for each blog post](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Future Content Initiatives

  - [Explored ideas from Ada: tax scenario templates, top app lists for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Darrell suggested prioritizing downloadable assets (potentially gated) for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Pier to consult legal team about form creation, especially regarding tax advice implications](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of community-led growth approach in the future](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement design changes to resolve H1 tag issue and improve blog layout](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Continue with content production schedule (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore GEO blog and LLM.txt implementation; Darrell to discuss with Dave and update team](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Pier to consult legal team about creating tax-related forms and templates](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Revisit discussion on GEO-specific blog and LLM.txt progress in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Consider implementation timeline for new content types (forms, templates) by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/UjCKzay9qYi9ph_pmzCaHw7fhpbhwUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

action_items.description: Talk to Tony re H1 tag issue + making text in graphics customizable in CMS
Talk to Dave re including Town in LLMs.txt approach, share current state + compare w/ shadow site idea
